message:
🐛 fix: raise GitHub proxy burst so card fan-out succeeds (#8299) (#8304)

GitHubActivity card fires ~7 parallel requests (repo, open/closed PRs,
open/closed issues, contributors, releases). With burst=5 the last 2+
were getting rejected immediately and surfaced as "Too many requests"
even when the user's PAT had quota left — the limit hit was the
console proxy's, not GitHub's. Raise burst to 20 and steady-state to
60/min, and reword the error so users understand which limiter fired.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
